name: Targeting Assist
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: Runs quietly in the corner of the sight. Writes the verdict before the pilot.

name: Auto Reload
effect_text: End Cycle: if you played no Weapon this turn, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The magazine fills itself. The pilot pretends not to notice.

name: Combat Protocol
effect_text: A basic combat subroutine.
flavor_text: The routine that runs whether the ship asks or does not ask for it.

name: Basic Subroutine
effect_text: A standard ship-side subroutine.
flavor_text: Old code, clean code, code that nobody ever thought worth rewriting.

name: Scan Array
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 1. Reorder the top card of your deck.
flavor_text: Four sensors. Four opinions. One averaged verdict on the cockpit glass.

name: Heat Sink Protocol
effect_text: Persistent Field. Remove 1 extra heat at each turn end.
flavor_text: Quiet routine. Cold routine. Keeps the pilot from becoming the story.

name: Repair Protocol
effect_text: Auto-Repair 1. Heals 1 HP at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Nothing dramatic. Just a small instruction, repeated, and repeated, and repeated.

name: Patrol Routine
effect_text: End Cycle: a random friendly Drone gains +1 attack until your next turn.
flavor_text: Somebody gets picked. Somebody feels brave. Usually the same drone twice.

name: Targeting Grid
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: A lattice of small judgments, all pointed the same careful direction.

name: Defensive Grid
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Defense units gain +1 defense.
flavor_text: Listens for the wrong sound. Amplifies the wall that muffles it.

name: Recon Array
effect_text: End Cycle: Probe 2. Reorder the top 2 cards of your deck.
flavor_text: Looks at tomorrow. Decides what tomorrow sees first.

name: Combat Controller
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain +1 attack.
flavor_text: A conductor behind the wingmen, keeping time they never knew they kept.

name: Tactical Analyzer
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Deep Scan. Choose 1 of 3 random cards from your deck.
flavor_text: Offers three futures. You pick the one that hurts less. You hope.

name: Shield Optimizer
effect_text: Persistent Field. Shield Capacity regenerates +1 per turn.
flavor_text: Small refinements in the shield coil logic. Quiet gains. Loud survivors.

name: Weapons Optimizer
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your next Weapon each turn costs 1 less.
flavor_text: The ship finds the bargain the pilot forgot to ask for.

name: Drone Manager
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain +1 defense.
flavor_text: Watches the swarm. Remembers which ones are new. Remembers what that means.

name: Heat Reducer
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your ship removes 1 extra heat at each turn end.
flavor_text: Quiet fans in quiet rooms, keeping the loud ones loud only outside.

name: Burst Analyzer
effect_text: Chain Catalyst. Your next non-unit card this turn deals +2 damage.
flavor_text: Looks at the trigger twice. Finds two triggers. Recommends both.

name: Cycle Routine AI
effect_text: Cycling Protocol. Once per turn, discard a card to draw one.
flavor_text: Keeps the hand moving. Keeps the pilot thinking. Both are paid from the same reserve.

name: Energy Regulator
effect_text: End Cycle: gain 1 energy at the start of your next turn.
flavor_text: The reactor complains. The regulator translates the complaint into useful work.

name: Assault Coordinator
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons gain Assault Protocol 1.
flavor_text: Speaks in commands no pilot hears, to guns that listen for nothing else.

name: Defense Coordinator
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Defense units gain +2 defense.
flavor_text: Refuses to lose anything small. Keeps the small things alive a little longer.

name: Master Targeting
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons deal +2 damage.
flavor_text: The shot leaves the barrel having already negotiated its arrival.

name: Repair Grid
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Heals 2 HP at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Two nanite crews, one night shift, a seam that always finishes by dawn.

name: Tactical Uplink
effect_text: End Cycle: Probe 1. Reorder the top card of your deck.
flavor_text: Polite intelligence. Never announces itself, always arrives before the threat.

name: Drone Swarm AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain +1/+1 while this is in play.
flavor_text: Every small voice in the swarm becomes a slightly larger one.

name: Weapons Coordinator
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons gain Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Moves every round to the top of the queue, politely, with teeth.

name: Defense Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Defense units gain Interceptor.
flavor_text: A web of walls. Every piece volunteers to be the first one broken.

name: Salvage Protocol
effect_text: Fuel Scavenge. Gain 1 energy whenever an enemy unit is destroyed.
flavor_text: Turns other people's endings into your next beginning. Coldly, repeatedly.

name: Combat Planner
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain Overclock.
flavor_text: Runs the fight twice in the abstract. Shares the shorter version with the pilot.

name: Hunter Logic
effect_text: Persistent Field. When your Weapons hit, apply Tracking Lock.
flavor_text: It does not forget the silhouette. It paints it into every future frame.

name: Deep Strategy
effect_text: End Cycle: Deep Scan. Choose 1 of 3 random cards from your deck.
flavor_text: Thinks a few moves ahead. Keeps the middle moves quiet, in reserve.

name: Adaptive AI
effect_text: Adaptive Learning. Gains +1 defense per distinct card type you have played.
flavor_text: Learns by losing. Loses less the next time. Eventually stops losing.

name: Efficiency Routine
effect_text: Efficiency Protocol. Your next 2 cards this turn cost 1 less.
flavor_text: Finds the cheaper door. The door is not any smaller, only the bill is.

name: Priority Manager
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons gain Priority Fire this turn.
flavor_text: Hands the pilot's gun a small advantage, whispered, never explained.

name: Chain Coordinator
effect_text: Chain Catalyst. Your next 2 non-unit cards this turn deal +2 damage each.
flavor_text: The fuse you thought was out was just waiting for the next card.

name: Cascade Protocol
effect_text: Cascading Power. +1 power to your next attack per non-unit card played this turn.
flavor_text: Every little card adds a little weight. The final shot lands with all of them.

name: Linked Fire AI
effect_text: Linked Fire. Your second Weapon each turn deals +2 damage.
flavor_text: Two triggers, one thought. The second trigger always knew the first.

name: Heavy Battle AI
effect_text: A heavy-duty battle subroutine.
flavor_text: Big decisions. Slow thoughts. Both arrive together at the critical moment.

name: Fortress AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Defense units gain Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: An old voice on the comm, calm, telling the wall not to fall yet.

name: Master Controller
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain +1 defense.
flavor_text: Takes the whole deck of the ship under its quiet, responsible arm.

name: Auto Commander
effect_text: Auto-Repair 3. Heals 3 HP at end of your turn.
flavor_text: The calm voice that orders the wounded to keep working and be careful.

name: Warfare Subroutine
effect_text: Overcharge. Pay 2 extra energy to deal 6 damage to any target.
flavor_text: Runs hotter than doctrine allows. Wins more often than doctrine admits.

name: Tactical Superiority
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons deal +2 damage.
flavor_text: The other pilot did everything right. And lost anyway, because of math.

name: Sentinel Network
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain Interceptor.
flavor_text: Every small ship volunteers. Every small ship pays the volunteer's bill.

name: Analyzer Matrix
effect_text: Modular Payload. Choose 1: Probe 2, Deep Scan, or Cycling Protocol.
flavor_text: Three buttons. Three answers. The right one is the one you already know.

name: Command Net
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain +1/+1 while this is in play.
flavor_text: An order that never stops being an order, for a fleet that remembers.

name: Advanced Targeting
effect_text: Persistent Field. When you play a Weapon, apply Tracking Lock to a random enemy.
flavor_text: Always points at somebody. Sometimes at someone who had forgotten to hide.

name: Master Protocol
effect_text: A master-level tactical subroutine.
flavor_text: Written by engineers who had already lost one fleet and preferred not to repeat.

name: Prime Directive
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units cannot be Disabled.
flavor_text: The rule the ship will not bend, even when the pilot is very, very tempting.

name: Overmind AI
effect_text: Cascading Power. +1 power to all your attacks per non-unit card played this turn.
flavor_text: Hears the whole fleet at once. Thinks in the full chord.

name: Fortress Net
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Defense units gain +3 defense.
flavor_text: Spun from old wartime algorithms. Nothing new goes through unless it really insists.

name: Ultimate Strategy
effect_text: End Cycle: Deep Scan and Probe 2.
flavor_text: Reads the board, reads the deck, reads the pilot. Returns a single word: yes.

name: Total Supremacy
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain +2/+2 while this is in play.
flavor_text: Not bragging. Just calmly informing the other pilot of the score.

name: Apex AI
effect_text: A top-tier command subroutine.
flavor_text: Written once. Compiled once. Still running in somebody's fleet, somewhere.

name: Flare Charge
effect_text: Reactive. The next incoming attack on your ship is reduced by 3.
flavor_text: Small bright object, thrown in the general direction of the missile's opinion.

name: Emergency Kit
effect_text: Play only if your Hull Integrity is below 50%. Restore 5 HP.
flavor_text: A small red box taped under the panel, unopened until today.

name: Panic Dump
effect_text: Scrap a Drone. Gain 2 energy.
flavor_text: The drone forgives the order. The pilot files the forgiveness away anyway.

name: Warhead Mk.I
effect_text: Deal 3 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Simple. Cheap. Exceptionally good at the one thing it was asked to do.

name: Repair Kit
effect_text: Restore 5 HP to your ship.
flavor_text: Silver tape, blue wire, a prayer the engineer hopes no one heard said aloud.

name: EMP Charge
effect_text: Disable target enemy unit's abilities next turn.
flavor_text: A small argument with the electrons. The electrons always concede.

name: Shield Patch
effect_text: Gain 4 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: A small seam across the emitter. A small lie for the enemy sensor.

name: Targeting Flare
effect_text: Apply Tracking Lock to target enemy unit.
flavor_text: A small green dot painted on the enemy ship. The pilot does not scrub it.

name: Energy Cell
effect_text: Gain 1 energy now; gain 1 energy at the start of your next turn.
flavor_text: Old chemistry, reliable chemistry, the kind that hums when the lights are out.

name: Scan Module
effect_text: Probe 1. Reorder the top card of your deck.
flavor_text: A small glance into tomorrow. Tomorrow never noticed it was being watched.

name: Hot Plating
effect_text: Target Drone you control gains +2 defense permanently.
flavor_text: Welded on during the fuel run. The drone never asked if it could refuse.

name: Warhead Mk.II
effect_text: Deal 6 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Second generation. Same yield. Better shipping container. The pilot notices neither.

name: Plasma Grenade
effect_text: Deal 3 damage to each enemy Drone.
flavor_text: Not precise. Not polite. Does the rough work the beam weapons forgot about.

name: EMP Burst
effect_text: Disable up to 2 enemy units' abilities next turn.
flavor_text: A long sigh of voltage. Two systems remember being quiet. Neither enjoys it.

name: Shield Booster
effect_text: Gain 8 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Not new technology. New dedication to it. The coil takes the hit because you ask.

name: Heat Sink
effect_text: Remove 3 heat from your ship.
flavor_text: Cold metal, quiet metal, metal that never wanted to know your name.

name: Jury-Rigged Booster
effect_text: Your next Weapon this turn deals +3 damage.
flavor_text: Built in a hurry by someone who read the manual twice and disagreed both times.

name: Nanite Repair
effect_text: Restore 8 HP to your ship.
flavor_text: A chorus of small mouths closing the hole the enemy opened this morning.

name: Deep Scan Module
effect_text: Deep Scan. Choose 1 of 3 random cards from your deck.
flavor_text: A tiny light goes on in the deck. One card remembers being important.

name: Reactor Vent Module
effect_text: Reactor Vent. Gain 2 energy; skip your next draw.
flavor_text: Bleed the reactor for the right amps, pay the bill with a card.

name: Bounce Module
effect_text: Bounce. Return target enemy Drone to its owner's hand.
flavor_text: The drone takes a long rest on the hangar rack. Somebody else wears the war.

name: Warhead Mk.III
effect_text: Deal 10 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Third generation. Third manual. Third funeral budget line item the fleet reserves.

name: Ion Bomb
effect_text: Deal 7 damage to target Weapons Array subsystem.
flavor_text: Does not need to be accurate. Only needs to be approximately where the gun lived.

name: Radiation Charge
effect_text: Radiation Leak. Target unit takes 4 damage over 3 turns.
flavor_text: The first turn the pilot smiles. The third turn the pilot does not.

name: EMP Wave
effect_text: Disable up to 3 enemy units' abilities next turn.
flavor_text: A tide. Lasts one turn. Enough to get several small gods through the door.

name: Shield Matrix
effect_text: Gain 14 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: A large grid of small refusals. A polite hedge against an impolite afternoon.

name: Energy Surge Module
effect_text: Energy Surge. Fill your energy meter to maximum.
flavor_text: A short, loud moment when the reactor forgets the rules it agreed to follow.

name: Salvage Beam
effect_text: Destroy target enemy Drone with 3 or less defense; you gain 2 energy.
flavor_text: A beam that eats. Small things first. Feeds the reactor with other people's sentences.

name: System Reset
effect_text: System Reset. Remove all statuses from target friendly unit.
flavor_text: Power down. Power up. The bad news on the panel is gone, for now.

name: Teleport Charge
effect_text: Return target friendly unit to your hand; you may redeploy it this turn for 1 less energy.
flavor_text: There and back again. The unit returns mildly disoriented but all there.

name: Mass Repair
effect_text: Restore 3 HP to every Drone you control.
flavor_text: A brief fleet-wide breath. Every small ship exhales a little longer.

name: Warhead Mk.IV
effect_text: Deal 14 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Fourth generation. The engineers stopped numbering them informally after this one.

name: Nova Grenade
effect_text: Deal 5 damage to each enemy unit.
flavor_text: Small sun in a briefcase. Lives for a moment. Leaves a room rearranged.

name: Ion Cannon Payload
effect_text: Deal 10 damage to target Reactor Core subsystem.
flavor_text: Aims at the part of the ship that everything else was plugged into.

name: Defensive Shell
effect_text: Gain 20 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: A shield the size of a verdict. Lands once. Lasts long enough to matter.

name: Combat Stim
effect_text: All your Weapons deal +3 damage this turn.
flavor_text: A quiet chemistry in the cockpit. The pilot gets loud in a useful way.

name: Cargo Missile
effect_text: Deal 10 damage. You may store this in Cargo face-down; its cost becomes 2 when played from Cargo.
flavor_text: Hidden in the hold. The enemy knows there is a box. The box is patient.

name: Fusion Bomb
effect_text: Deal 12 damage to target and apply Radiation Leak 2 for 2 turns.
flavor_text: A small sun pressed into a smaller shell. Unfolds without apology.

name: Tactical Recall
effect_text: Archive Recall. Play a copy of a Module from your discard pile.
flavor_text: Reaches back into the yesterday that worked. Brings it here without comment.

name: Warhead Mk.V
effect_text: Deal 18 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: The brochure does not list the model. The pilot does not list the name.

name: Cascade Warhead
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Deal 14 damage; adjacent enemy units take 3 each.
flavor_text: One door goes. The neighbors become doors. The hallway opens on everything.

name: Orbital Strike
effect_text: Deal 16 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: The word came from orbit. The answer arrived from the same direction.

name: Ultimate Shield
effect_text: Gain 30 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: The largest polite refusal you can bolt to a ship without reviewing the welds.

name: Nuclear Charge
effect_text: Deal 22 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: The button is grey, not red. The grey buttons are the ones that mean it.

name: Life Reactor
effect_text: Restore 25 HP to your ship and gain 3 energy.
flavor_text: Trades the overbuilt redundant reactor for the pilot's next hundred heartbeats.
